name: Pumpkin-Raisin Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Lowfat milk or orange juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the oil, sugar, eggs, and pumpkin until light and fluffy.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the flours, baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and raisins.
3. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture with the milk or orange juice.
4. Pour the batter into an oiled 9 x 5 inch loaf pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes.
1/15 recipe - 153 calories, 1 bread, 1/2 fruit, 1 fat (23 grams), carbohydrate (3 grams), protein (3 grams), fat (6 grams), sodium (122 mg), potassium (117 mg), cholesterol (37 mg)
Source: American Diabetes Association Holiday Cookbook by Betty Wedman, 1986
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Nov 93
